benefits.title: Competitive Compensation
benefits.desc: Market-rate salaries that reflect your experience and expertise.

benefits.title: Generous Leave
benefits.desc: Paid vacation, sick time, and holiday coverage so you can recharge.

benefits.title: Comprehensive Insurance
benefits.desc: Medical, dental, vision, life, AD&D, disability, EAP, and retirement plans.

benefits.title: Professional Development
benefits.desc: Grow alongside us, advancing your skills with continued education and certification support.

faqs.a:
Apply – Submit your application online
Review – Recruiters assess your qualifications.
Next Steps – If you're a match, we'll reach out for an interview.
Interviews – Zoom or in-person, often with a panel.
Offer – Sent via Paycom; respond within 3 business days.
Pre-Employment – Background check, reference check, and physical exam.
External: cmcenters.org/careers Internal: Log into ESS via Paycom. Students: Apply online and send your resume to careers@cmcenters.org.
Check the job description for required skill and experience before applying.

faqs.q: How long until I hear back?
faqs.a: Immediate email confirmation from Paycom after applying. High-volume roles: 4–6 weeks. Recruiters will contact you if more info is needed.

faqs.q: Can I apply for more than one role?
faqs.a: Yes, you'll be considered for all positions that fit your background.

faqs.q: Will I know if I'm not selected?
faqs.a: Yes, we send email notifications at various stages.
Most interviews are done via Zoom with at least two panelists. Some take place in-person, especially for administrative roles.

faqs.q: Do I need a cover letter?
faqs.a: Optional, but a great way to stand out.

Loan repayment programs (HRSA, SLRP, CAL HealthCares, HCAi, Song Brown)
Free CME
Medical, dental, vision insurance (Kaiser/Sutter options)
Flexible spending accounts + dependent care match
Life & disability insurance
403(b) retirement savings
Paid time off, sick leave, and holidays
